how_it_works: Jetty ~300m west of STF Sitojaurestugorna. Arrive 30 min early (paid then). Boarding before 08:00/17:00. Other times by call-ahead. From south: call when leaving Aktse to book. No mobile coverage at Svijnne landing -- call before arriving.

season.special_note_sep13: Only 1 crossing, must book ahead. No crossings after 12:00. Booking required both directions.

price.note: Not listed on the operator page as of the last check; ask when booking by phone or email.

booking: Call or email ahead. Arrive 30 min early for regular timetable. Off-schedule times by arrangement.

sources.note: Primary operator source, shows Season 2026 timetable directly.
Secondary STF summary, consistent with operator's page.
